logMessages.fesNotFound: FES program not found in image
logMessages.selectImageFirst: Please select an image file first

popup.initTimeoutMsg: Device initialization timeout, please check device connection
popup.scanTimeoutMsg: Device scan timeout, please check device status. This is usually caused by device freeze. You can power cycle the device
popup.timeoutMsg: Device response timeout, please check device connection or reselect device
popup.unsupportedMsg: Current device mode is "{{mode}}", only FEL mode is supported

deviceBusy.message:
Device is occupied by another operation.

Please wait for current operation to complete before trying again.
deviceBusy.title: Device Busy

deviceNotFound.message:
No Allwinner device detected.

Please confirm:
1. Device is connected to computer via USB
2. Device has entered FEL mode (usually requires holding specific button while powering on)
3. USB cable is properly connected
deviceNotFound.title: Device Not Found

deviceNotReady.message:
Device is not ready yet.

Please wait for device initialization to complete before trying again.
deviceNotReady.title: Device Not Ready

invalidDeviceMode.message:
Current device mode does not support this operation.

Please ensure device is in correct mode (FEL or FES mode).
invalidDeviceMode.title: Invalid Device Mode

usbError.message:
USB communication error: {{error}}

Possible solutions:
1. Check USB connection
2. Change USB driver type
3. Replug device
usbError.title: USB Error

usbInit.message:
Unable to initialize USB driver. This may be due to driver mismatch or driver not installed

Possible solutions:
1. Check if USB driver is correctly installed
2. Try changing USB driver type (Settings → Device Settings → USB Driver)
3. Replug the USB device
4. Restart the application
usbInit.title: USB Initialization Failed

usbOpen.message:
Unable to open USB device.

Possible solutions:
1. Device may be occupied by another program, please close other flashing tools
2. Try changing USB driver type (Settings → Device Settings → USB Driver)
3. Windows users: If using libusb, use Zadig to install libusb driver
4. Windows users: If using WinUSB, ensure device uses vendor driver
usbOpen.title: Cannot Open Device

usbTimeout.message:
USB communication timeout.

Possible solutions:
1. Device may not be responding correctly, please reset device
2. Check if USB connection is stable
3. Try re-entering FEL mode
usbTimeout.title: USB Communication Timeout

usbTransfer.message:
USB data transfer failed.

Possible solutions:
1. Change USB port (recommend using motherboard direct USB port)
2. Change USB cable
3. Avoid using USB hubs
4. Check if device has sufficient power
usbTransfer.title: USB Transfer Failed
